templates.name: Epic Concert Stage Energy
templates.description: High-energy concert footage with dynamic crowd reactions and stage pyrotechnics
templates.prompt: Epic rock concert performance, massive stadium stage, thousands of fans with raised hands and phone lights, stage pyrotechnics exploding in sync with music beats, dynamic camera movement sweeping from stage to crowd, lead singer commanding the stage under dramatic spotlights, laser light show cutting through smoke effects, 4K cinematic quality, high energy atmosphere

technical_specs.color_grading: high contrast with vibrant stage lighting

camera_movements.description: Start wide on crowd, sweep up and over to stage
Push in on performer during chorus

lighting_effects.crowd_lighting: phone flashlights creating sea of lights

templates.name: Surreal Music Video Aesthetics
templates.description: Artistic music video with abstract visual effects and creative transitions
templates.prompt: Avant-garde music video aesthetic, artist performing in surreal dreamlike environment, floating geometric shapes morphing with music rhythm, double exposure effects blending performer with abstract visuals, neon color palette shifting with mood, creative practical effects with mirrors and projections, smooth gimbal movements, artistic lens flares, film grain texture

visual_effects.geometric_overlays: shapes pulse and rotate with beat

camera_movements.description: Dolly zoom creating surreal perspective shift

templates.name: Behind The Scenes Studio Session
templates.description: Intimate recording studio footage capturing the creative process
templates.prompt: Professional recording studio session, musician laying down tracks in vocal booth, warm ambient lighting from vintage lamps, mixing console with dancing VU meters, producer adjusting faders, close-up shots of hands on instruments, cozy studio atmosphere with acoustic panels, documentary-style handheld camera work, shallow depth of field focusing on emotional moments

technical_specs.color_grading: warm, slightly desaturated for authentic feel

camera_techniques.focus_pulls: rack focus between performer and equipment
camera_techniques.detail_shots: extreme close-ups of instruments and controls

studio_elements.equipment_focus: vintage mics, analog gear, mixing board
studio_elements.atmosphere: dim mood lighting, visible cable runs

templates.name: DJ Set Synchronized Visuals
templates.description: High-energy DJ performance with perfectly synchronized visual effects
templates.prompt: Professional DJ performing at packed nightclub, DJ deck close-ups with glowing buttons and spinning vinyl, crowd hands up in unison, synchronized LED wall displaying reactive visuals, laser beams cutting through fog machine haze, strobe lights pulsing with BPM, dynamic dutch angles and quick cuts matching beat drops, neon-lit atmosphere

synchronization.bpm_matching: cuts and effects locked to tempo

camera_movements.description: Fast pan from DJ to crowd

templates.name: Intimate Acoustic Performance
templates.description: Warm, personal acoustic performance in unique atmospheric venue
templates.prompt: Singer-songwriter performing acoustic guitar in candlelit historic church, natural reverb from stone architecture, soft golden hour light streaming through stained glass windows, intimate audience seated close, gentle camera movements on slider, extreme shallow depth of field with beautiful bokeh, warm wood tones of vintage guitar, emotional close-ups of performer's expressions

technical_specs.color_grading: warm, golden tones with soft contrast

templates.name: Dynamic Dance Choreography Showcase
templates.description: Multi-angle dance performance capturing intricate choreography and movement
templates.prompt: Professional dance crew performing synchronized hip-hop choreography in industrial warehouse space, multiple camera angles including overhead drone shots, slow-motion sequences highlighting complex footwork, dynamic lighting with moving spots, mirror formations and breaking patterns, urban street style with athletic precision, quick cuts matching choreography accents

camera_angles.description: Ground level looking up at dancers

templates.name: Festival Crowd Energy & Atmosphere
templates.description: Capturing the collective energy and atmosphere of a music festival
templates.prompt: Massive outdoor music festival at golden hour, aerial drone footage of thousands of festival-goers, main stage with headliner performing, multiple festival stages in background, crowd surfing and mosh pits, festival fashion and face paint details, food vendors and art installations, capturing both epic scale and intimate human moments, dust particles in sunset light

technical_specs.color_grading: warm sunset tones with vibrant festival colors

drone_sequences.description: Rise from crowd to reveal full festival

atmosphere_elements.lighting: sunset golden hour to stage lights

templates.name: Instrument Detail with Sound Visualization
templates.description: Macro shots of instruments with visual representation of sound waves
templates.prompt: Extreme close-up macro shots of violin strings vibrating in slow motion, visible sound waves emanating as light particles, bow hair detail creating friction, rosin dust particles floating in dramatic lighting, intercut with pianist's fingers on keys with visual frequency spectrum overlays, guitar pick striking strings with visible harmonics, cinematic depth of field

technical_specs.color_grading: rich, saturated with emphasis on instrument materials

templates.name: Band Dynamic Performance
templates.description: Capturing the interplay and energy between band members during performance
templates.prompt: Rock band performing in rehearsal space, dynamic camera movement between band members, guitarist and bassist facing off during solo section, drummer in full flow with sweat and motion blur, lead singer interacting with each member, quick cuts showing musical conversation, instruments and amps in frame, raw authentic energy, handheld camera work

band_coverage.member_focus: equal screen time for each member

templates.name: Music Production Process Visualization
templates.description: Visual journey through the music production process from creation to final mix
templates.prompt: Music producer building track in modern DAW, screen recordings of waveforms and MIDI being edited, hardware synthesizers with blinking LEDs and turning knobs, coffee cup and late night studio session vibe, multiple monitor setup with plugins and mixing board, creative process visualization with animated sound waves flowing between equipment, time-lapse of track building layer by layer

technical_specs.color_grading: modern tech aesthetic with color-coded elements

production_stages.visuals: MIDI notes appearing on piano roll

general_guidelines.camera_sync: Always synchronize camera movements with musical rhythm and dynamics
general_guidelines.lighting_importance: Lighting should enhance the mood and energy of the performance
general_guidelines.human_connection: Capture genuine emotions and connections between performers and audience
general_guidelines.technical_quality: Maintain high production values while preserving authentic moments
general_guidelines.audio_visual_harmony: Visual elements should complement and enhance the musical experience
